resources.string: Experimental option, enabled by default. Turning this off starts closer to the original game without STS2Mobile.dll / port_compat.pck patches; the game may fail to enter because Steam / Steamworks environment and mobile patches are missing. Fully restart the game after changing it.
Uses more conservative FMOD audio buffer settings on next launch. Keep this off by default; turn it on if a device has no sound or unstable audio.
Main author of this mobile port.
After setup is complete, try to prepare files and launch the game directly from the desktop icon.
Open the launcher settings page when tapping the desktop icon.
More detailed logs for troubleshooting MODs, rendering or startup issues.
Normal runtime diagnostics with the smallest log size.
Disable godot.log and sts2.log entirely. Use only when you do not need diagnostics.
Most verbose diagnostics. Logs can become very large and may affect performance.
Hide hover tooltips on mobile. Inspect screens and other explicit detail pages still work.
Keep the original PC behavior: show tooltips as soon as an item is hovered or touched.
Keep the screen clean while tapping. Hold the same target for 1 second to reveal its tooltip until you release.
Load known shader resources in advance. This is not full GPU pipeline compilation.
Do not load extra shader resources during warmup.
Try to warm up all known VFX scenes. Experimental and heavier.
Warm up common combat VFX only.
Do not instantiate extra VFX scenes during warmup.
Stable compatibility renderer, recommended for most Android devices.
Lower driver overhead and potentially smoother rendering, but some devices may crash or show glitches.
This deletes the selected game body but keeps launch profiles. Affected profiles remain visible and will ask you to re-import, download or rebind a game body before launching.
Delete this MOD file from internal storage?
This will overwrite progress unlock data and clear current run saves on next game launch. Continue?
"An unexpected error occurred. Sorry for the inconvenience."
This deletes only the mobile compatibility pack. Launch profiles that referenced it are kept and will show the pack as missing until edited.
This removes the imported game body but keeps launch profiles that use it. Global and isolated save/MOD folders are kept.
This deletes the imported game body but keeps launch profiles that point to it. Those profiles remain visible and will require a re-import, download or rebind before launching.
This removes only the launch profile. Shared game bodies are kept. Isolated save/MOD folders under the profile are deleted.
Open the Quark share for the game package.
Unable to setup the Godot Engine! Aborting…
Warning - this device does not meet the requirements for Vulkan support
You cannot paste a folder into itself or one of its child folders.
Copied %1$d item(s). You can paste them in another folder.
Delete the selected %1$d item(s)? This cannot be undone.
Browse the app private files directory, copy and paste files, import or export through SAF, edit text files with the built-in editor, or open files in other apps.
The selected folder cannot be accessed.
Tap to open. Long-press to select, then use the top-right actions for copy, export, rename, or delete.
A file or folder with the same name already exists.
No compatible app was found for this file.
Unable to rename the selected item.
The storage provider returned an empty stream.
%1$d folder(s), %2$d file(s). %3$d copied item(s) can be pasted here.
This folder is empty. %1$d copied item(s) can be pasted here.
Reference launcher project and mobile MOD UI inspiration.
Friend link: Slay the Amethyst Modded (STS1 mobile mod launcher).
Restart the current fight from the pause menu.
STS2 MOD support library by BAKAOLC.
Integrates with the Steam StS2 launcher, supports beta builds and cloud saves, and provided this project with a stable reference for MOD management ideas.
This will replace the current app private data with the selected backup, including saves, options, Extra Settings preferences and MODs. Current private data may be overwritten or deleted. Continue?

Backs up the whole app private data directory, including game saves, game options, Extra Settings preferences, imported MODs, MOD profiles, logs and other private files. Importing replaces current private data with the backup contents; fully restart the game afterwards.
The selected file is not a valid full app data backup.
Compress and export all private app data.
Android compatibility pack disabled; launching original game body.
Import a data package before playing
❌ Button unavailable: import the game first
A friendly overview for launch, saves and current mobile status.
Changes take effect after restarting the game.
Ready to launch after any changed settings.
Keep the renderer and advanced graphics values already saved.
Open GitHub to create a new launcher issue.
Add the MOD names that should be treated as installed during LAN compatibility checks. Nothing is bundled by default, and you can freely add multiple entries.
That MOD entry is already in the list.
Tap the button to add, edit, or delete LAN compatibility entries in a popup. The list starts empty and is fully user-defined.
Empty by default. No compatibility entries are bundled.
Disabled by default. This switch is only available after enabling custom player ID above. When enabled, the ID derived from the input below is also applied to the platform player ID.

Disabled by default. You can enter numbers, English text, or other text such as Chinese. The game will automatically map the text above to a stable internal player ID for LAN reconnect / conflict debugging.
Enter any player ID (text is auto-mapped)

Enabled by default for the built-in LAN compatibility layer. Turn it off to skip all Android LAN patches on the next game launch; the compatibility pack also skips them automatically when the STS2 Game Lobby MOD is loaded.

"Launching without the Android compatibility pack removes STS2Mobile.dll and the mobile overlay for this run. Steam skipping, save path redirection, MOD loading, mobile input/UI fixes and Harmony patches may be unavailable, so the game may fail to start or MODs may not load.
Enable the compatibility pack for the recommended Android path, or continue only for diagnostics."

"Selected pack: %1$s Pack support: %2$s Current game: %3$s
This check only compares game version labels/support lists. Edit the current launch profile to switch packs, or continue anyway."
Global uses the legacy app-wide folders. Isolated creates folders under this launch profile, so the same game body can have independent saves and MODs.
Use an isolated MOD folder for this profile
The selected game body is missing or incomplete.
The selected launch profile “%1$s” points to game body %2$s, but that body is missing or incomplete. Re-import/download the body, choose another launch profile, or edit this profile before launching.
Use an isolated save/settings folder for this profile
No launch profiles yet. Import a game zip or create one from an installed game body.
A profile chooses one game body plus global or isolated save/MOD roots.
Edit the current launch profile and choose a compatible mobile compatibility pack before launching.
Import a game zip before launching.
The log file no longer exists. It may have been deleted or not generated yet.
Off disables godot.log and sts2.log entirely. Debug and Very Debug output can be very large and may affect performance. The selected level is applied next time the game starts.
This file is not a directly previewable text log.
This log file has no displayable content.
Tap a log entry in the list above to preview its content.

Recursively scans .log files and sentry/reports under the app internal and external user-data directories, then sorts them by modified time. Tap to open a detail page, or long-press to multi-select, range-select, select all, copy, share, or export a ZIP.
Tap an item to open its detail page. Long-press a start item, tap an end item, then use Select range from the top menu.
This file is large, so only the last %1$s is shown here.
First select a start item, then tap an end item, and use Select range.
Choose a log sorted by time
%1$d log files found, sorted by modified time. Latest update: %2$s
No readable log files were found. If you just updated to a build with the log viewer, launch the game once and check again.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.

When enabled, the in-game max multiplayer players setting takes effect. When disabled, the vanilla default of 4 players is used. Turning this off avoids signature changes that may conflict with some mods.
Require a second confirm tap for sensitive mobile selections.
Enabled by default. When on, placing a second finger on screen triggers card inspect / alternate preview behavior. Turn this off if it causes touch issues on your device.
Delete selected %1$d MOD(s)? This cannot be undone.
Select at least one MOD first.
Supports .zip / .json / .pck / .dll. MOD switches are matched by manifest JSON ID and imported files are stored in the app internal mods directory.

An installed MOD already uses the same ID. Keeping two manifests with one ID can make them appear as two items while any switch toggles both. Choose whether to keep the installed MOD or replace it with the new import.
No MODs match the current filter.
The default profile cannot be deleted.
A profile stores the currently enabled MOD IDs. Applying it updates all installed MOD enable switches at once.
Save and switch named MOD loadouts.

"This feature copies saves between the MOD-disabled and MOD-enabled save locations.
This time it will copy “%1$s” to “%2$s” and overwrite existing saves on the destination side. Fully restart the game after transfer. Continue?"
Copies saves between the MOD-disabled and MOD-enabled save locations (the modded folder). Existing saves in the destination side will be overwritten. Fully restart the game after transfer.
Search MOD name, ID, author or dependency
Select two MODs first to fill the range between them.
Search, classify and batch manage imported MOD manifests.
MOD details are parsed only from manifest JSON files that declare an ID. Tap cards to select them; batch actions appear after selection.
Import, filter and batch-edit local MODs.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
NexusMods refused the request. Check your API key or account permissions.
Game domain: %1$s · No API key saved.
Save a NexusMods Personal API Key first.
Enter and save your own key manually. It is stored only in this app private preferences.

"Open https://www.nexusmods.com/settings/api-keys Scroll to the bottom of the page. Tap “Request Personal API Key” to obtain your key.
Do not share the key with others."
How to get a Personal API Key
The requested NexusMods item was not found.
Remove the saved NexusMods Personal API Key from this app?
NexusMods did not return a direct download link for this file.

"NexusMods returned: %1$s
Premium accounts can usually generate direct download links through the API. Non-premium accounts may need to open the NexusMods website, start the manual download there, then paste the generated NXM link containing key and expires."
Choose a file to download. Main files are shown first when NexusMods marks them.
No downloadable file entries were returned for this MOD.
Try a numeric MOD ID or open the NexusMods website search.
If NexusMods asks you to visit the website first, open the file page, start manual download, copy the nxm:// link, then paste it here.
That does not look like a complete NXM download link.
Configured game domain is %1$s, but the NXM link is for %2$s.
Trending, latest added and latest updated NexusMods results.
Current game domain: %1$s. The official API does not provide full global text search, so keyword search filters trending/latest/updated feeds; use a Nexus MOD URL or numeric ID for exact lookup.
Use a MOD name, Nexus URL, or numeric MOD ID.
Search NexusMods, view files and download MODs into the private MOD folder.
Save your Personal API Key, then use Discover or Search to browse MODs. Downloaded ZIP files are imported just like local MOD imports.
Import a local PC game zip or download your owned copy from Steam into the app-private payload store.
Turning the master switch on or off does not change these detailed values.
Choose which startup and runtime caches are warmed up.
Prepare common attack/damage/VFX managed methods. Disabled by default to match the old behavior.
Master switch only. Tap the arrow for detailed preload management.
Instantiate common single-player / multiplayer submenus after startup. Disabled by default to match the old behavior.
Keep original preloading when entering runs, acts and rooms. Enabled by default.
Load the original CommonAssets cache after the main menu appears.
Load character select, library, history, timeline and other main-menu pages in advance.
Custom keeps the current saved values.
Friend link: quickRestart2 MOD (restart current fight from pause menu).
When enabled, a Retry button is added to the pause menu during single-player runs, allowing you to reload the last autosave. Turn this off to avoid potential mod conflicts.
Controls which renderer Godot uses on next launch. If Vulkan crashes on your device, switch to OpenGL ES 3.0 compatibility mode.
Controls the fullscreen render resolution used by the game on next launch.
Manage normal and modded save slots.
Enter a custom global scale value (0.5x - 4.0x).
Custom scale must be between 0.5 and 4.0.
Changes the Godot content scale factor on next launch.
Fine-tune rendering, scale and frame pacing.
Most graphics options require a full game restart. Renderer changes are applied when Godot starts again.
Configure runtime log detail and inspect generated logs.
The top presets only toggle the three core touch options. Advanced switches below can still be changed individually.
Full extra settings, rebuilt with Material 3 cards.
Fast switches for graphics and mobile UI scale.
Import, export, unlock and transfer save slots.
Use simpler mobile-safe shader variants where available.
Controls whether the floating emoji button is shown in multiplayer on mobile. Turn this off if you want a cleaner screen.
Lift hand cards higher so more text remains readable.
Download failed because the resources could not be found
Download failed because the external storage is full
Download failed because you may not have purchased this app
Download paused. Test a website in browser
Download paused because no network is available
Download paused because you are roaming
Download paused because the external storage is unavailable
Download paused because wifi is disabled
Download paused because wifi is unavailable
Texture cache will be rebuilt on next launch.
Full data backup restored. Fully restart the game to apply it.
No transferable saves were found in “%1$s”.
The previous game launch did not finish startup.
Last attempted renderer: %1$s. If startup still fails, try disabling newly added MODs before relaunching.
If it closed instantly or no recovery screen appeared, try OpenGL ES 3.0 compatibility mode before retrying.
Game body selected through a launch profile. Restart the game to apply it.
Launch profile selected. Restart the game to apply it.
Unlock-all request queued. Restart the game to apply it.

• This app does not upload any Steam account information; it only saves the refresh token locally.

• Enter Steam account information only in this app when it was downloaded from a trusted source to protect your account.

• After installing unknown MODs, we recommend logging out to avoid the potential risk of a malicious MOD reading the local RT and stealing the account.

• Before using Steam Cloud saves, please make a backup first to avoid save loss caused by unexpected failures.

• In mainland China, using Steam related services may require a network accelerator.
Account: %1$s SteamID64: %2$s Cloud mode: %3$s Last error: %4$s
Login is used only for your own Steam download and Steam Cloud saves.
Pulling Steam Cloud saves before launch…
Uploading Steam Cloud saves after clean exit…

"%1$d file(s) changed both locally and in Steam Cloud since the last sync.
Conflicts: %2$s
Which copy do you want to keep?"
This can overwrite newer Steam Cloud files. Remote deletions are not performed. Continue only if you are sure the local save root is the version you want.
Force local saves to Steam Cloud?
Steam Cloud pull before launch failed: %1$s You can open the Steam center, cancel launch, or launch anyway using local saves.
Pull before launch + push after clean exit
The current launch profile save root will be backed up privately first, then supported Steam Cloud files will replace local files with the same paths.
Overwrite local saves from Steam Cloud?
Synchronize the current launch profile save root with Steam Cloud.
Approve the login in the Steam mobile app, then tap OK to continue polling.
Enter the current Steam mobile authenticator code.
The previous mobile authenticator code was rejected. Enter a new code.
Enter the Steam Guard email code sent to %1$s.
The previous email code was rejected. Enter the new code sent to %1$s.
Before playing this mobile port, please purchase and support the official desktop version on Steam!
Your password is used only for this login request and is not stored. The app stores only the Steam refresh token in encrypted preferences.
This removes the saved refresh token and Steam Guard data from this app. Local payloads and saves are kept.
Please keep this screen open until the operation finishes.
Enter the Steam branch to download. Use public unless you know the exact beta branch name.
Requires a Steam account that owns Slay the Spire 2. Downloaded files are installed under payloads/<payload_id>/game and then selected through a launch profile.
Download STS2 from SteamPipe and install it as an immutable payload.
Crash details are unavailable. Please copy whatever is visible on this screen and describe what happened just before the crash.
Open Recovery Settings first if the game keeps crashing on launch. The report below stays copyable and uses a compact font for screenshots.
Retry immediately, or open Recovery Settings to switch renderer / disable mods before relaunching.
The full error text is shown below in a slightly smaller monospace font to make long screenshots easier.
An unexpected error interrupted the Android build.
This file does not look like text, so the built-in editor cannot open it.
Save the current changes before editing this file in another app.
Edit text files in the private directory
This file is too large. The built-in editor currently supports text files up to %1$s.
This file has unsaved changes. Discard them and go back?
Would you like to enable downloading over cellular connections? Depending on your data plan, this may cost you money.
If you choose not to enable downloading over cellular connections, the download will automatically resume when wi-fi is available.
XAPK File Validation Complete. Select OK to exit.
Show card preview when lifting a touch in combat.
Automatically checks the GitHub releases of ModinMobileSTS/Sts2MobileLauncher when Extra Settings opens.
Immutable imported payloads. Create multiple launch profiles for the same body to isolate saves or MODs.
Android compatibility pack disabled in Settings.
Install or import mobile compatibility packs. Assign a pack when creating or editing a launch profile.
Import a PC game zip into the payload store. Switching profiles does not copy the PCK.
A matching compatibility pack is available: %1$s
No game bodies yet. Import a game zip to create one.
Manage game bodies, launch profiles and mobile compatibility packs.
Disabled by default. When enabled, pressing the volume up key in-game opens the system soft keyboard so you can use the console or keyboard shortcuts more easily.
Use volume up to open soft keyboard
Original, mobile optimized, or keep a custom screen setup.
Choose UI scale and render size separately from the renderer.
Finish setup and continue to the launcher overview.
You can enter the main settings screen now. The recommended defaults will remain applied.
Recommended uses OpenGL ES, MSAA 2x and VSync off. Quality uses native resolution, unlimited FPS, VSync on and Vulkan. Compatibility disables MSAA, uses OpenGL ES and enables shader compatibility.
Preset cards choose renderer, MSAA and sync behavior.
This mobile port starts with Extra Settings so you can choose a safe renderer, screen scaling, save import and touch behavior before entering the game.
Existing settings are kept. If you already changed resolution or scaling, the wizard will mark them as Custom instead of overwriting them.
Touch optimized enables mobile selection confirmation, extra hand-card text and lift-to-preview. Original operation disables those options for controller, mouse or keyboard play.
Choose a touch-first or original input baseline.
Renderer, MSAA, VSync and shader compatibility.
Choose renderer and frame pacing first.
Skipping is safe. Save import/export is also available on the Game and Settings tabs.
Import an existing save now, or skip this step.
Pick a comfortable baseline first. You can tune everything later.
